abilities.name: Sound The Pursuit!
abilities.flavor: With a howl that echoes like a winding horn, the Gorewarden infuses their minions with a feverish desire to hunt and feast.
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, until the start of your next turn, when making charge rolls for the target, add 1 to the number of dice rolled, to a maximum of 3, then remove 1 dice of your choice and use the remaining dice as the charge roll.

abilities.name: Holy Blades Of Bone
abilities.flavor: Crypt Horrors wield huge, monstrous femurs – as well as other grisly relics – as if they were blessed weapons.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit and that charged this turn to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target unit.

abilities.name: Lie Of The Land
abilities.flavor: The Beastflayers’ familiarity with their hunting grounds allows them to easily outflank their prey.
abilities.effect: If this unit is not in combat and is wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units

abilities.name: Unholy Chorus
abilities.flavor: The shrieks of a Crypt Flayer pack leave their enemies disoriented and harrowed.
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 10" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract an amount from the target’s control score equal to the number of damage points allocated to the target this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks .

battleTraits.name: Delusions And Madness
battleTraits.summary: On a 1-3, you must pick a different DELUSION to the one you picked last time
battleTraits.declare: You must use this ability at the start of each battle round. If it is the first battle round, pick a DELUSION . Otherwise, make a delusion roll by rolling a D6.
battleTraits.effect: On a 1-3, you must pick a different DELUSION to the one you picked last time. On a 4+, you must pick the same DELUSION as last time. For the rest of the battle round, you believe the DELUSION you picked.

battleTraits.name: Delusion Of The Great Feast
battleTraits.declare: If you believe this DELUSION , pick each friendly unit on the battlefield to be the targets.
battleTraits.effect: Heal (1) each target. If the target is a SERFS unit, return D3 slain models to it instead. KEYWORDS DELUSION
